title: Complete a TypeScript quote contract
description: Fill in a TypeScript module so it exposes a strongly typed quote summary function.
instructions: Define and export a Quote interface with symbol, previousClose, and currentPrice fields.
Define and export a QuoteSummary interface with symbol, change, changePct, and direction fields.
Implement export function summarizeQuote(quote: Quote): QuoteSummary.
direction must be up, down, or flat.
Round change and changePct to two decimals.
